title: Greedy Algorithm to Find Minimum Number of Coins
statement: Given an amount n and unlimited coins of denominations {1,2,5,10}, find the minimum number of coins required to make the amount using a greedy approach (pick largest denomination first).

title: Activity Selection (N Meetings in One Room)
statement: Given start[] and finish[] arrays of activity times, select the maximum number of non-overlapping activities (a person can do only one at a time). Use a greedy strategy sorting by finish time.

title: Subset Sums
statement: Given an array of non-negative integers and a target sum, determine if there exists a subset whose elements sum to the target. Typical DP solutions use O(n*sum) or optimized O(sum) space.

title: Implement Stack Using Arrays
statement: Implement a stack data structure using a fixed-size array supporting push, pop, peek/top, isEmpty and isFull operations; handle overflow and underflow conditions appropriately.

samples.explanation: Popping when empty triggers underflow message
